name: Eagle's Landing Country Club
description: Eagle's Landing Country Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Stockbridge, GA. There are 8 outdoor clay courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, food, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.

name: Fairview Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Fairview Recreation Center in Stockbridge, GA! There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — membership is available /$3 daily rate

name: Hidden Valley Park
description: Hidden Valley Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Stockbridge, GA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and lights. The courts can be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Jimmie Lee Smith Community Center
description: Jimmie Lee Smith Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Stockbridge, GA. You'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: J.P. Moseley Recreation Center
description: J.P. Moseley Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Stockbridge, GA. There are 4 indoor wood and hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, trainers or lessons, and food. The courts cannot be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees:
Fee required — Free for members of the Rec Center
One time daily fee for non Rec members

name: Richard Craig Tennis Complex
description: Richard Craig Tennis Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in McDonough, GA. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and lights. The courts cannot be reserved.
